'''''Star Wars Weekly'' 97''' is the ninety-seventh issue in the ''[[Star Wars Weekly]]'' series of comic reprints, published on [[January 2]], [[1980]]. It included the original story "[[The Day after the Death Star!]]".

==Contents==
*"[[The Day after the Death Star!]]"
*"Deathlok the Demolisher Part 9: Deathman... follow me no more!"
*"Guardians of the galaxy! Part 24: The shipyard of Deep Space!"
*"Tales of the Watcher: A robot in hiding!"
